  # restore original
  echo "$ORIG" > "$SRC"
  # apply mutation
  local content=$(cat "$SRC")
  local mutated="${content/$old/$new}"
  if [ "$content" = "$mutated" ]; then

  echo "$mutated" > "$SRC"
